title: Dev Buddy Pipeline Config
description: Configuration format for the configurable pipeline architecture. Ordered arrays of stage entries for feature and bug-fix pipelines.

feature_pipeline.description: Ordered list of stages for the feature development pipeline.

bugfix_pipeline.description: Ordered list of stages for the bug-fix pipeline.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of fix/re-review iterations per reviewer stage before escalating to user.

team_name_pattern.description: Pattern for generating unique pipeline team names. Supports {BASENAME} and {HASH} placeholders.

StageEntry.description: A single pipeline stage entry specifying its type, provider preset, and model.

type.description: Stage type from the fixed registry of 6 supported types.

provider.description: Provider preset name (key from ~/.vcp/ai-presets.json). Must reference a configured preset.

model.description: Model name. Required. Must match /^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/ to prevent shell metacharacter injection (CWE-78).

parallel.description: When true, this stage runs in parallel with adjacent same-type stages that also have parallel: true. Only applies to plan-review and code-review types.
